default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 5 new blog posts published, 2 ready to publish, 7 refreshers nearly complete](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Competitor mentions allowed in listicles; David to review competitor-related content](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [New non-volume-based pricing is a key differentiator; to be highlighted in content](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Macro-level content audit needed; Jacob to review and sync next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Content OS to be refreshed with recent updates and suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [5 new blog posts published](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [2 finished posts ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [7 refreshed articles nearly complete, pending final edits](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [3 new topics identified for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Looker Studio dashboard to be set up for tracking progress](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

### Content Strategy for Competitor Mentions

  - [Competitors can be mentioned in listicle-style articles](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Airbyte should be positioned favorably compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [David to personally review all competitor-related content](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Team to create list of key differentiators for each product category](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Pricing Strategy in Content

  - [Airbyte's new non-volume-based pricing is a significant differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Pricing to be highlighted in introductions and "how to select" sections](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Focus on pricing difference and other key differentiators in content](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Jacob offered to discuss backlink strategy in a separate 30-minute meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [David expressed willingness to support with contacts and experience](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### Content Audit and Revamp

  - [Some content revamp done months ago, but not comprehensive](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Current process: refreshing 7 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Focus on main traffic and lead generation pages](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Jacob to review content at a macro level and sync next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content OS Update

  - [David to refresh Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Remove unnecessary items](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Incorporate recent suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Aim for easier navigation and clarity](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to review and update competitor-related content in listicles](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Mario's team to create list of key differentiators for product categories](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Jacob to schedule 30-minute meeting to discuss backlink strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Jacob to conduct macro-level content audit and sync findings next week](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [David to refresh and update Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Set up Looker Studio dashboard for content progress tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Continue with planned content production and refresh schedule](https://fathom.video/share/Vc-L6B3M2Bhzuij4bdkyvzpoiCJTfdHq?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

action_items.description: Personally review all competitor-related content before publishing
Create new templates for product comparison pages, update outdated ones
Request list of key differentiators from team, esp. new pricing model vs competitors
Set up Looker Studio dashboard to track progress of refreshed/new blog posts
Schedule 30-min meeting w/ Mario to discuss backlinking strategy
Analyze content strategy at macro level, prepare insights for next meeting
Refresh content OS: remove unnecessary items, add new suggestions, improve usability
